programs.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
programs.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) Warren face a new challenge.Mysterious forces threaten the life of their daughter, Judy.

programs.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programs.desc: Many years before Snow White's birth, Queen Ravenna (Charlize Theron) observes the actions of her sister, Freya (Emily Blunt), who is in love with a man named Andrew.Soon their daughter is born.Shortly thereafter, the child is murdered.At the same time, Freya discovers that she has the power to control ice.The woman leaves Ravenna's lands with a broken heart.He creates his own kingdom and an army of deadly hunters.There is only one rule in their ranks: never to love.It is broken by two warriors - Eric (Chris Hemsworth) and Sara (Jessica Chastain).Freya decides to separate them.Seven years later, after Ravenna's death, Snow White decides to get rid of the evil queen's mirror, moving it to the sanctuary.Some time later, William informs Eric that the soldiers who were responsible for the expedition have gone missing.The hunter suspects Freya - the mirror could significantly increase her power.He agrees to complete the mission, with the help of the dwarves.

programs.title: Le cinéma de Terry Gilliam : l'imagination au pouvoir
programs.desc: A look at the artistic achievements of Terry Gilliam, screenwriter, director, actor and animator.From the comedy "Brazil" to the painting "The Man Who Killed Don Quixote", through the works of the Monty Python cabaret.

programs.title: The Goldsmith's Secret
programs.desc: 1999. Goldsmith Juan Pablo travels from Spain to New York for an exhibition of his works.On the way he passes through his hometown.He will meet Celia, a great love who changed his life.

programs.title: Barry
programs.desc: Barry (Bill Hader) is a low-end hitman.He is depressed, feels lonely and burnt out.Despite his reluctance, he accepts an assignment in Los Angeles, where he is to eliminate a young, aspiring actor.While tracking his target, he comes across a meeting of a theater group.Surprisingly, he feels great in the company of artists.Under their influence, he comes to the conclusion that he would like to break up with his current profession.However, it is not that simple.The originators of the series are Alec Berg, a five-time Emmy candidate, and Bill Hader, who plays the title character.The screen shows, among others:winner of two Golden Globes, Henry Winkler and Stephen Root.
